title: Marvell Technology Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Before Q1 FY27 Release
text: Marvell Technology is scheduled to announce its results for the first quarter of Fiscal 2027 on May 27. Wall Street expects Marvell to report earnings per share of $0.79 for Q1 FY27, implying 27.4% year-over-year growth. Revenue is estimated to rise by about 27% to $2.40 billion. Goldman Sachs believes Marvell will increase its 2026 and 2027 revenue growth guidance, driven by strength in AI data center sales. Goldman Sachs raised its fiscal 2027 and 2028 revenue estimates to $11.12 billion and $15.35 billion, respectively. MRVL stock has rallied more than 120% year-to-date, driven by strong demand for its custom AI chips and optical connectivity solutions. Wall Street has a Strong Buy consensus rating based on 22 Buys and four Holds, with an average price target indicating significant upside potential.
